name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement
description: Standard terms for a mutual NDA allowing both parties to share confidential information for a specific purpose.

name: Mutual NDA Cover Page
description: Cover page template to be completed and signed alongside the Mutual NDA Standard Terms.

name: Cloud Service Agreement
description: Comprehensive agreement governing the provision of cloud-based software services, including access rights, payment, liability, and confidentiality.

name: Design Partner Agreement
description: Agreement for early access to a product in exchange for feedback, allowing the provider to develop and improve the product.

name: Service Level Agreement
description: Agreement defining uptime targets, response time targets, and service credits for cloud services.

name: Professional Services Agreement
description: Agreement governing the provision of professional services including deliverables, IP assignment, payment, and confidentiality.

name: Data Processing Agreement
description: GDPR-compliant agreement governing how a provider processes personal data on behalf of a customer, including SCCs and security incident response.

name: Partnership Agreement
description: Standard agreement governing cooperation between two companies, including trademark licensing, payment, and confidentiality.

name: Software License Agreement
description: Agreement governing the licensing of on-premise or self-hosted software, including installation rights, updates, and support.

name: Pilot Agreement
description: Agreement for providing trial or pilot access to a product for evaluation purposes before entering a long-term agreement.

name: Business Associate Agreement
description: HIPAA-compliant agreement governing the handling of protected health information (PHI) by a business associate on behalf of a covered entity.

name: AI Addendum
description: Addendum to a cloud service or software agreement governing the use of AI services, model training restrictions, and ownership of AI outputs.
